TextENGNew: ``Speaking of which, Mion.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3002. You seemed pretty close with Natsumi-chan earlier. Were you two good friends?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hmm? Yeah, I guess.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3002. She was pretty shy, so if I didn't invite her myself, she'd never join the group.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3003. Before I knew it, we just naturally hit it off.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``She was such a cute girl, wasn't she~?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3002. Standing next to her, Mii-chan, you looked like her big sister.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahahahahaha!@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3005. ...Just so you know, Rena, Natsumi-chan is actually older.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3006. Older than me, in fact.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Really?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3004. But she was cute as a little kitten~ hau~♪``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Good thing you left when you did, Natsumi-chan.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: A few more minutes of chatting and Rena would have devoured you and carried you off.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``But girls really do change, huh~@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3008. No offense, but when I first met her, she gave off this kind of gloomy vibe.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3009. She was difficult to read and hard to get close to... the atmosphere around her was kind of off-putting.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh...?@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3004. Hard to imagine from the person I just met.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``But after she graduated middle school, she brightened up so much. Just like she is now.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3011. Seeing that made this old man think 'so that's what it means to grow up,' you know~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion said that with a wistful, faraway look in her eyes, as if reminiscing about the distant past. ...Though I have to say, Mion, that kind of gesture doesn't make you look like a 'big sister'--it makes you look more like a grandma.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``So that means... Mii-chan will change someday too, right?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3006. What would a grown-up Mii-chan look like? I wonder~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahahahaha, that's obvious, isn't it~?@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3013. I'll become this idol or madonna overflowing with grace and intellect, the envy of every male student everywhere~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Vulgarity and idiocy?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Kei-chan... do you have some kind of grudge against me?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``N-No, I wouldn't say that...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hau... but even Rena can't imagine that version of Mii-chan~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Come on, even you're saying that, Rena~?!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: It's true... Mion will probably always be like this, boldly leading the charge with her tomboyish energy. That suits her best.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I wouldn't mind seeing a refined, delicate, ladylike Mion either, but... honestly, I really liked our current dynamic where we could laugh our hearts out and goof around together as equals.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Wait, hm?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Come to think of it, we've been talking about Mion this whole time, but what about Rena? Would she change too when she grew up?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh, ...Rena?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3009. Rena will always be Rena.@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3010. Now and forever, always the same.@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3011. Hau~♪``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...So the same take-home-anything-cute-obsessed girl, then woman, then old lady, then grandma?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That's a bit unpleasant to imagine.@k@vS20/03/VTT_mion3017. ...One wrong step and she'd be a thief or a kidnapper.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Th-That wouldn't happen~?@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3013. When I grow up, I'll act with at least the bare minimum of common sense!@k@vS20/02/VTT_rena3014. ...Probably.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``No, I mean, sure, maybe.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3009. ...But Rena.@k@vS20/01/VTT_keiichi3010. What you just said kind of sounds like you're admitting your current behavior is 'lacking in common sense.'``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...You dug your own grave there, Rena.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Still... a grown-up Rena and Mion. I wonder what my reaction would be when I actually see that.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: That's something to look forward to.
